info.title: Intrinio API
info.description: The Intrinio API provides access to comprehensive financial data including real-time and historical stock prices, company fundamentals, options data, ETF holdings, analyst estimates, technical indicators, economic data, SEC filings, and more. The API uses HTTPS with RESTful endpoint structure and returns JSON responses.

tags.name: Options
tags.description: Options data, chains, expirations, and pricing

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: Company ticker, CIK, or Intrinio ID

apiKeyAuth.name: api_key
apiKeyAuth.description: Intrinio API key passed as query parameter
